purpose: Two-state environmental integration review against the real phone UI
lockedInvariants: Use the supplied 390x844 phone capture as the exact composition
Preserve the live seamless circle of 36 individually readable 3D tile blocks
Render every inner and outer ground-plane circle through the same center and live camera transform as the tile route
Preserve board position, scale, tilt, tile geometry, landmark art, caretaker, controls, and all UI text
L0 must keep all four landmark plots empty and the boss hidden
L3 must keep all four landmarks at their supplied finished forms and the boss visible
Do not generate replacement UI or merge generated pixels into runtime controls
allowedEnvironmentChanges: Water contact darkening beneath the cliff
Submerged reef and rock shelves extending from the island
Finer near-island water texture and restrained reflections
rejectedPatterns: Changed phone UI, labels, counters, controls, or type
New props in the playable tile corridor
Background that reads as a flat image placed behind the island
reviewRule: Approve the background only after both L0 and L3 real phone composites pass at 390x844. Generated studies guide contact, water, and lighting only.
